nasb.text: From that land he went forth into Assyria, and built Nineveh and Rehoboth-Ir and Calah,

esv.text: From that land he went into Assyria and built Nineveh, Rehoboth-Ir, Calah, and

cnv.text: 他從那地出來，到亞述去，建造了尼尼微、利河伯城、迦拉，

ccb.text: 后来扩展到亚述，在那里建立了尼尼微、利河伯、迦拉各城，

csbs.text: 他从那地出来，往亚述去，建造了尼尼微、利河伯-以珥、迦拉，
